calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-09-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name
Change of Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok and M. Grier. Case not called on
the record. Proceedings not reported.

Petitioners father Gengyuan Yu and mother Yanzhu Yu of minor present in court.
Petitioners sworn through Cantonese Interpreter Anthony Tam.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the
petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.

The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from current name
Jiayin Yu to new name Kelly Jiayin Yu.
Decree Changing Name signed by the court.
